_comment: STAGING template. On the staging box copy to app-secrets.json (git-ignored, same name as prod since it's a separate box). Differs from prod ONLY in the URLs/CORS/email — everything points at the staging host, and email uses a sender that does NOT touch the client's rumirestaurant.ch reputation.
_email_note: Staging must NOT send from rumirestaurant.ch (would affect the client's domain sending reputation). Use Resend's shared onboarding@resend.dev sender (no domain verification needed) until a staging/SaaS sending domain is verified. Netcup blocks SMTP, so Provider stays Resend.
_google_note: Same Google OAuth client as prod. Add https://v2202607374190477434.megasrv.de to the OAuth client's Authorized JavaScript origins in Google Cloud console, or Google login will be rejected on staging.
